sector_alerts.title: OpenAI: 42-State AG Investigation + IPO Filing
sector_alerts.description: Coalition of 42 state attorneys general served OpenAI a subpoena on Jun 12 — four days after confidential S-1 IPO filing. Scope: consumer/health data, child safety, model sycophancy, safety testing. Florida first civil lawsuit Jun 1. Cross-entity implication: sets precedent for state-level AI accountability applicable to Anthropic, Google DeepMind, Meta AI, xAI.

sector_alerts.title: DRC/Uganda Ebola PHEIC — Spread to Displacement Camps
sector_alerts.description: WHO PHEIC (May 17 2026) ongoing: 676 confirmed cases, 136 deaths, Bundibugyo strain (no approved vaccine/treatment). Al Jazeera Jun 12: outbreak spreading into crowded displacement camps in northeast DRC. MSF responding under severe resource strain. Affects DRC, Uganda, and risks spilling to Rwanda, South Sudan, CAR.

sector_alerts.title: Sahel Lean Season 2026: 52.8M at Acute Food Insecurity (Jun-Aug Peak)
sector_alerts.description: FAO/WFP: lean season Jun-Aug 2026 peak now active. 52.8M at acute food insecurity across West Africa/Sahel — 10-year high. Burkina Faso/Mali/Niger junta-controlled zones restrict access to 3.5M in besieged areas. WFP funding 40% below need; $174.7M emergency gap. 13M+ children facing malnutrition. US aid cuts compounding the crisis.

sector_alerts.title: Oracle: June 15 Severance Deadline — 30,000 Employees
sector_alerts.description: TODAY is Oracle's final sign-or-forfeit severance deadline for the Mar 31 2026 mass layoff (30,000 employees, 18% of workforce). Employees refusing coercive terms lose all severance. Workers tried to negotiate — Oracle refused. India offices heavily impacted. Largest single-day tech layoff in corporate history. Watch for WARN Act litigation and labor board complaints in coming weeks.

sector_alerts.title: Russia: OVD-Info Extremist Designation + 35 Civil Society Orgs (Jun 4 2026)
sector_alerts.description: HRW Jun 5: Russia designated OVD-Info (founded 2011, helped tens of thousands with free-speech legal cases) as "extremist" — criminal penalty for association. Part of wave designating 36 organisations. Proposed "civic death" law advancing to strip overseas dissidents of property rights. Russia now world's 3rd-largest jailer of journalists (50 incarcerated). Systematic erasure of civil society.

sector_alerts.title: EU AI Act: Digital Omnibus Amendments Agreed May 7 2026
sector_alerts.description: Council/Parliament/Commission reached provisional agreement May 7 on Digital Omnibus AI amendments — first changes since AI Act adoption Jun 2024. Includes: timeline extensions, simplified compliance for some actors, two new prohibitions (CSAM and non-consensual intimate imagery via AI, effective Dec 2 2026). High-risk AI obligations take effect Aug 2 2026. Affects all AI labs operating in EU.

sector_alerts.title: Bolivia: Military State of Exception Now Active — Escalation Risk
sector_alerts.description: Bolivia's state of exception law enacted Jun 9; military deployment to clear 90+ roadblocks authorised. At least 9 dead (6 from blocked medical access); coca growers threaten to seize military facilities. US labelling protests "attempted coup." Week 6+ of nationwide unrest. Score just downgraded to 6.3 (critical Jun 14). Risk of direct military-civilian confrontation in coming days.
